title: Shadow Squadron (disambiguation)
content:
'''Shadow Squadron''' can refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Shadow Squadron]], an elite [[starfighter]] [[squadron]] of the [[Galactic Republic]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Shadow Squadron (Sith Empire)]], a squadron of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]
*[[Shadow Squadron/Legends|Shadow Squadron]], a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]] unit of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
*[[Shadow Squadron (Galactic Empire)]], an Imperial [[V-wing]] and [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170]] unit of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
**[[Shadow Squadron (TIE Phantom)]], an Imperial [[TIE/ph phantom]] unit of the Galactic Empire.
**[[Shadow Squadron (TIE Defender)]], an Imperial [[TIE/D Defender]] unit of the Galactic Empire.
**[[Shadow Squadron (Itani Nebula)]], an Imperial [[Unidentified TIE variant|TIE fighter]] unit of the Galactic Empire involved in the [[Battle near the Itani Nebula]].
*[[Shadow Squadron (Rebel)]], an infiltration unit of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
*[[Shadow Squadron (New Republic)]], an X-wing squadron of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Disambig}}
